headline: Stifel Maintains a Hold Rating on Revvity (RVTY)
summary: Revvity, Inc. (NYSE:RVTY) is one of the Best Mid Cap Value Stocks to Buy in 2026. On March 13, Stifel maintained a Hold rating on Revvity, Inc. (NYSE:RVTY) with a price target of $110. ​The rating follows the firm’s meeting with the management of Revvity, where management expressed cautious optimism regarding certain parts of the […]
